hero.title: Bio-based crop protection for healthier harvests.
hero.subtitle: Synergy Crop Solutions delivers innovative bio-fertilizers, bio-pesticides, and residue-free crop protection products that help farmers grow more while protecting the land for future generations.
hero.quote: Committed to residue-free farming. Trusted by growers across Maharashtra and Karnataka. We partner with distributors and dealers to build a sustainable agricultural future.

about.label: About Synergy
about.title: Driving Residue-Free Agriculture in Maharashtra & Karnataka
about.body: Synergy Crop Solutions is a regional agricultural input company focused on developing and distributing bio-fertilizers, bio-pesticides, and residue-free crop protection products. Founded with a vision to transform agriculture in Maharashtra and Karnataka, we bridge the gap between modern crop science and traditional farming wisdom. Our team combines deep agronomic expertise with a passion for sustainable farming. We work closely with farmers, research institutions, and distribution networks to ensure that every product we bring to market is safe, effective, and environmentally responsible.

trust.label: Why Farmers Trust Us
trust.title: Built for the Challenges of Modern Agriculture

stats.label: Bio-Based Solutions — formulated from natural sources with zero chemical residues.
Distribution network serving farmers across Maharashtra and Karnataka.
Guarantee — every product meets rigorous quality standards.
By thousands of growers for consistent quality and visible results.

cards.title: Bio Fertilizers
cards.description: Advanced bio-based nutrient solutions that enrich soil health and boost crop yields naturally.

cards.title: Bio Pesticides / Fungicides
cards.description: Effective residue-free pest and disease control products derived from natural sources.

cards.title: Consortia Products
cards.description: Synergistic microbial consortia for enhanced soil fertility, plant growth, and stress tolerance.

cards.title: Liquid Nutrition
cards.description: Ready-to-use liquid formulations for targeted nutrient delivery and rapid crop response.

cards.title: Organic Inputs
cards.description: Certified organic soil amendments and natural inputs for sustainable farming systems.

innovation.label: Technology & Innovation
innovation.title: Bringing Science to the Soil
innovation.body: Our research and development team works continuously to develop new-generation crop protection products that are safe, effective, and residue-free. We combine agronomic research with field-level insights to create solutions that address the real challenges faced by farmers in Maharashtra and Karnataka. From microbial consortia to advanced liquid nutrition, every product is formulated using cutting-edge agricultural science.

items.title: Japanese Lyophilization
items.desc: Advanced freeze-drying technology preserving high CFU counts for maximum efficacy.

items.title: High CFU Formulations
items.desc: Concentrated microbial counts ensuring robust performance in diverse soil conditions.

items.title: Organic Formulations
items.desc: 100% bio-based compositions with zero chemical residues for safe agriculture.

items.title: Bio-Enhancers & Consortia
items.desc: Synergistic microbial blends that boost plant growth and soil regeneration.

coverage.label: Our Reach
coverage.title: Regional Distribution Network
coverage.description: From the farms of Maharashtra to the plantations of Karnataka, our products reach farmers through a robust network of distributors and dealers.

cta.label: Partner with Synergy
cta.title: Ready to grow with confidence?
cta.text: Switch to bio-based, residue-free crop protection today. Our team is ready to help you build a more resilient and profitable crop program.
